topic: Marin Daily: Component sourcing, optical stack, electrical design, firmware progress — Wednesday Mar 4
summary: Prioritize mobile optical stack for immediate revenue while building hardware component sourcing pipeline for future family device optionality.

actionItems.text: Define component categories and supplier relationships for family hardware device
actionItems.description: Research and categorize sensor arrays, display modules, edge AI processing units, and camera systems needed for family interaction monitoring device. Build preliminary supplier relationships without purchase commitments to establish lead time visibility. Create component specification framework that aligns with family-centered product vision.
acceptanceCriteria: Comprehensive component category matrix covering sensors, displays, processing, and connectivity
Contact established with 3+ suppliers per component category
Lead time and pricing estimates documented for each component class

actionItems.text: Architect mobile optical stack with hardware extensibility hooks
actionItems.description: Design camera processing, document scanning, and AR overlay architecture for Lever mobile app that can scale to dedicated hardware. Ensure mobile implementation builds toward hardware vision rather than creating technical debt. Focus on monetizable features like financial document processing and family photo organization.
acceptanceCriteria: Mobile optical processing architecture documented with clear hardware extension points
Technical specification for camera API integration and document scanning workflows
Revenue-driving features identified and prioritized for development

actionItems.text: Document family interaction patterns and metrics for hardware vision
actionItems.description: Define specific family interaction behaviors and environmental factors that hardware optical stack should detect and enhance. Focus on strengthening relationships and improving family connection quality. Create measurable outcomes that justify hardware investment and guide component selection.
acceptanceCriteria: Family interaction behavior taxonomy with specific measurable patterns
Environmental factors list that impact family connection quality
Hardware feature requirements mapped to relationship strengthening outcomes

topPriorities: Mobile-first optical processing architecture with hardware extensibility
Component sourcing relationship building for sensors and displays
Family interaction metrics definition for hardware product vision

ceoDirectives.directive: What is Lever's direction? → Hybrid — personal tool now with product optionality built in
Keep faith content as separate standalone section (not merged into Family tab)
Keep cash liquid — no deployment until post-launch revenue data
App Store submission: full current build (all 4 tabs) as-is with faith lessons. Submit immediately after merge, ship modal as day-one update.
Paper trading MVP: manual entry (6 weeks), basic free / advanced analytics premium. Integrate into current Lever app finance tab.
Launch with delayed market data for both free and premium tiers. Real-time as future ultra-premium.
Org flattened to 8 C-suite agents. No permanent sub-agents — spawn dynamically via sessions_spawn.

typeName: Marin Daily: Component sourcing, optical stack, electrical design, firmware progress
